title: Tell HN: I'm a PM at a big system of record SaaS. We're cooked
summary: A senior PM argues AI startups won't disrupt SoR SaaS, but cloud providers and AI labs competing for SaaS margins via AI agents are the real threat.

title: Ask HN: Why are so many rolling out their own AI/LLM agent sandboxing solution?
summary: Many developers run coding agents in custom sandboxes. Author asks what's missing from existing solutions and what a 'good enough' standard looks like.

title: A curated directory of open-source AI projects
summary: OSSAIX is a curated directory for open-source AI projects covering LLMs, RAG/agents, local AI, and media generation.

title: Show HN: AgentArmor – open-source 8-layer security framework for AI agents
summary: An open-source framework wrapping agentic architectures with 8 security layers: prompt injection detection, encryption, risk scoring, PII redaction, mutual auth, etc.

title: Show HN: Agentpanel – Universal LLM API Written in Rust
summary: An observability platform in Rust for optimizing LLM/AI agent control flow, token usage, and correctness. Gateway to 100+ LLMs across 20+ platforms.

title: Show HN: Mirror AI – LLM agent that takes action, not just chat
summary: A cross-platform desktop LLM agent that runs terminal commands, manages files, calls APIs, and chains steps locally with no SaaS backend.

title: We built a type-safe Python ORM for RedisGraph/FalkorDB
summary: GraphORM is a type-safe Python ORM for RedisGraph/FalkorDB, targeting AI agent developers for storing long-term memory as graphs.

title: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Consequential Real World Tasks
summary: A locally-runnable benchmark to test LLM and AI agents' abilities to perform real-world tasks, providing a standardized evaluation framework.

title: Practical tips to optimize documentation for LLMs, AI agents, and chatbots
summary: A comprehensive guide on structuring technical documentation so LLMs and AI agents can better parse and use the content.

title: Universal ROS bridge for AI agents – control robots with LLMs
summary: Agent ROS Bridge connects AI agents to real robots running ROS with decorators for auto-generated type-safe message classes and gRPC/WebSocket APIs.
